metadata.dataset_name: Bangsamoro Autonomy Acts comprehensive catalogue with source links and analysis
metadata.scope_note: Compiled from the Bangsamoro Parliament BAA index/detail pages, BARMM Official Gazette BAA listings/PDF links, and uploaded full-text GAAB PDFs for selected budget laws.
important_limitations: Some direct PDF/full-text links returned 403/errors or were not text-extractable in the browsing environment; those records are marked in reading_status and data_quality_notes.
For BAAs without an accessible full PDF in this pass, the gist is based on the official title, Parliament/Gazette listing, available detail-page metadata, and statutory drafting conventions.
Use the recorded source_link/source_links for legal verification before quoting exact statutory text.

analysis.comprehensive_gist: Creates a regional transitional justice and reconciliation framework and a commission to address conflict-related grievances, document violations, recommend reparative and reconciliation measures, and institutionalize a peacebuilding process. The measure is best understood as a peace-and-accountability law: it sets up program architecture, a commission, and funding authority for truth-seeking, reconciliation, reparative recommendations, and conflict-sensitive institutional response.
key_effects: Establishes a transitional justice and reconciliation program.
Creates a commission to support truth, accountability, reparative measures, and reconciliation.
analysis.implementation_or_policy_notes: Creates a regional transitional justice and reconciliation framework and a commission to address conflict-related grievances, document violations, recommend reparative and reconciliation measures, and institutionalize a peacebuilding process.
analysis.reading_basis: Parliament detail metadata and Gazette/Parliament listing reviewed
